testcase.name: App > should render
ThemeProvider > should render children correctly (default)
ThemeProvider > should handle local storage correctly
ThemeProvider > should handle system-preference correctly
ThemeProvider > should do nothing when mode is not system, and system-preference changes
useTheme hook outside ThemeProvider > should throw an error when used outside ThemeProvider
ThemeScript > should render children correctly (default)
core manager cornercases > getSystemTheme should return 'light' when window is undefined
core manager cornercases > subscribeToSystemTheme should return undefined when window is undefined
core manager cornercases > loadStoredMode should return 'system' when window is undefined
core manager cornercases > saveStoredMode should not throw when window is undefined
core manager cornercases > getServerSnapshot should always return 'system'
core manager cornercases > subscribe should not re-read storage when listeners already exist
loadStoredMode with valid stored value > should return 'system' when localStorage has that value
loadStoredMode with valid stored value > should return 'light' when localStorage has that value
loadStoredMode with valid stored value > should return 'dark' when localStorage has that value
alert - renders > renders nothing initially
alert - renders > renders AlertComponent when alert type is 'alert'
alert - renders > renders ConfirmComponent when alert type is 'confirm'
alert - api corner cases > should warn if alert is called in a non-browser environment
alert - api corner cases > should not warn in production environment (non-browser)
alert - api corner cases > should warn if showAlert is called while another alert is active
alert - api corner cases > should warn if showConfirm is called while another alert is active
alert - api corner cases > should warn if showAlert is called while another confirm is active
alert - api corner cases > should not warn in production environment even if multiple alerts are triggered
alert - showAlert > should handle close correctly (default options)
alert - showAlert > should handle close correctly (custom options)
alert - showConfirm > should handle confirm correctly (default confirm text)
alert - showConfirm > should handle confirm correctly (custom confirm text)
alert - showConfirm > should handle cancel correctly (default cancel text)
alert - showConfirm > should handle cancel correctly (custom options)
alert - SSR > should not render anything in non-browser environment
toast - renders > should render all types of toasts
toast - renders > should remove toast from queue on dismiss
toast - renders > should warn if maxToasts is set to 0 or less
toast - renders > should not warn in production environment
toast - SSR > should not render anything in non-browser environment
toast - api corner cases > should warn if duration is an invalid number
toast - api corner cases > should not warn in production environment (invalid duration)
toast - api corner cases > should not register toast in non-browser environment
toast - api corner cases > should not log warning in production environment (non-browser)
useFocusTrap - cornercases > when Tab is pressed on a middle element
useFocusTrap - cornercases > does not intercept Tab when focus is outside the container
useOutsideInert - cornercases > does not throw when container is a direct child of <html>
Alert - aria > ID > Alert.Content's ID matches Alert.Trigger's aria-controls
Alert - aria > ID > Alert.Title's ID matches Alert.Content's aria-labelledby
Alert - aria > ID > Alert.Description's ID matches Alert.Content's aria-describedby
Alert - aria > Attributes > Alert.Trigger has aria-haspopup=dialog
Alert - aria > Attributes > Alert.Content has role=alertdialog and aria-modal=true
Alert - aria > Attributes > should apply `inert` to outside DOM tree when Alert is open and should remove it when Alert is closed
Alert - corner cases > asChild onClick chaining > fires both the child onClick and the slot onClick
Alert - corner cases > does not log warnings for missing Alert.Content in production environment
Alert - corner cases > does not log warnings for missing Alert.Title or Alert.Button in production environment
Alert - interactions > Clicks > trigger click opens the alert, button click closes it
Alert - interactions > Clicks > overlay click does not close the alert
Alert - interactions > Keyboard > escape key does not close the alert
Alert - interactions > Focus > Initial Focus > focuses the first focusable element when alert opens
Alert - interactions > Focus > Initial Focus > focuses Alert.Content itself when there are no focusable elements
Alert - interactions > Focus > Focus Trap > Tab/Shift+Tab cycles focus within Alert.Content and cannot escape
Alert - interactions > Focus > Return Focus > returns focus to Alert.Trigger when alert closes
Alert - interactions > Focus > Return Focus > returns focus to the previously focused element when there is no trigger
Alert - interactions > Others > background scroll is locked while open and restored on close
Alert - interactions > Others > Async Button Actions > stays open while pending and sets correct properties
Alert - interactions > Others > Async Button Actions > closes on resolve
Alert - interactions > Others > Async Button Actions > stays open on reject
Alert - state > supports uncontrolled mode
Alert - state > supports controlled mode with isOpen and onOpenChange
Alert - structure > SSR environment > renders in-place when portal prop is set (portal bypassed before mount)
Alert - structure > supports portal mode
Alert - structure > Alert.Content > must be used within the Alert wrapper
Alert - structure > Alert.Content > renders in place when portal prop is not set
Alert - structure > Alert.Title > must be used within Alert.Content
Alert - structure > Alert.Title > should support `asChild` property
Alert - structure > Alert.Message > must be used within Alert.Content
Alert - structure > Alert.Message > should support `asChild` property
Alert - structure > Alert.Button > must be used within Alert.Content
Alert - structure > Alert.Button > should support `asChild` property
Alert - structure > Alert.Trigger > must be used within the Alert wrapper
Alert - structure > Alert.Trigger > should render outside Alert.Content
Alert - structure > Alert.Trigger > should support `asChild` property
Alert - structure > Alert.Overlay > must be used within the Alert wrapper
Alert - structure > Alert.Overlay > should render outside Alert.Content
loop > returns correct style for looping animation with default options
loop > returns correct style for looping animation with custom options
loop > returns empty style when isLooping is false
loop > returns empty style when reduced motion is preferred
loop > handles numeric duration with no scale for rotate animations
loop > gracefully handles invalid iteration values
loop > doesn't warn if environment is production (invalid iteration)
loop > warns when iteration value of 1 is used
loop > doesn't warn when iteration value of 1 is used in production
resolveDuration > returns correct bounce durations
resolveDuration > returns correct swing durations
resolveDuration > returns correct durations for other animations
resolveDuration > warns in dev when a negative numeric duration is used
resolveDuration > does not warn in production when a negative numeric duration is used
resolveTiming > returns correct timing function for animations without custom easing
resolveTiming > returns correct timing function for animations with custom easing
useLoop > returns isLooping and 2 callbacks
useLoop > handles startAnimation and stopAnimation correctly
useLoop > handles multiple start/stop cycles correctly
useLoop > returns stable callback references across re-renders
resolveDelay > should return correct delay for predefined values
resolveDelay > should return correct delay for numeric values
resolveDelay > warns in dev when a negative numeric delay is used
resolveDelay > does not warn in production when a negative numeric delay is used
resolveEasing > should return correct easing for predefined values
resolveEasing > should return the same value for standard easing options
prefersReducedMotion > returns false when window is not defined
prefersReducedMotion > returns true when the media query matches
prefersReducedMotion > returns false when the media query does not match
useReducedMotion > updates state when the media query change event fires
transition > entry animations > returns correct default style for entry animation
transition > entry animations > returns correct style for entry animation with custom options
transition > entry animations > returns empty style when reduced motion is preferred
transition > exit animations > returns correct default style for exit animation
transition > exit animations > returns correct style for exit animation with custom options
transition > exit animations > returns empty style for exit animation when reduced motion is preferred
resolveDuration > resolves typed durations correctly
resolveDuration > returns numeric duration as is
resolveDuration > warns in dev when a negative numeric duration is used
resolveDuration > does not warn in production when a negative numeric duration is used
useAnimatedExit > handles startClosing correctly
useAnimatedExit > respects preset duration string value
useAnimatedExit > works without an onClose callback
useAnimatedExit > clears the timer on unmount and does not call onClose
useAnimatedExit > calls the latest onClose when it changes between renders
useAnimatedExit > does not update state when component unmounts during onClose
useAnimatedExit > logs error in dev when onClose throws
useAnimatedExit > does not log error in production when onClose throws
useAnimatedExit > respects reduced motion preference
BaseSvgBuilder > should generate components successfully
BaseSvgBuilder > should generate components successfully with index and suffix
BaseSvgBuilder > should fail invalid kebab-case filename
BaseSvgBuilder > should throw error for duplicate component names
BaseSvgBuilder > should throw error for duplicate SVG content
BaseSvgBuilder - dry-run mode > should not write any files
BaseSvgBuilder - dry-run mode > should not delete any files
BaseSvgBuilder - dry-run mode > should log a dry-run banner
BaseSvgBuilder - dry-run mode > should log would-write messages instead of writing
BaseSvgBuilder - dry-run mode > should log a would-generate summary message
BaseSvgBuilder - dry-run mode > should log would-delete messages instead of deleting when manifest exists
BaseSvgBuilder - dry-run mode > should still validate naming rules in dry-run mode
BaseSvgBuilder - dry-run mode > should still detect duplicate component names in dry-run mode
FamilySvgBuilder > should generate icons with barrel files when generateIndex is true
FamilySvgBuilder > should not write any files in dry-run mode
FamilySvgBuilder > should not generate barrel files when generateIndex is false
FamilySvgBuilder > should throw error for icons without family folder
Manifest Generation and Cleanup > should generate manifest file with list of generated files
Manifest Generation and Cleanup > should clean up files based on manifest
Manifest Generation and Cleanup > should not delete files outside SRC_DIR even if in manifest
StandaloneSvgBuilder > should generate icons with barrel files when generateIndex is true
StandaloneSvgBuilder > should not write any files in dry-run mode
StandaloneSvgBuilder > should not generate barrel files when generateIndex is false
atomicWrite > should write content to a temporary file and then rename it
atomicWrite > should delete temporary file and throw error if rename fails
atomicWrite > should handle nested directories
Kebab-case validation > should accept valid kebab-case filenames
Kebab-case validation > should reject filename with uppercase letters
Kebab-case validation > should reject filename with underscores
Kebab-case validation > should reject filename starting with number
Kebab-case validation > should reject filename containing numbers
Kebab-case validation > should reject filename with numbers in middle
Kebab-case validation > should reject filename starting with dash
Kebab-case validation > should reject filename ending with dash
Kebab-case validation > should reject filename with double dashes
logger > should log info messages in cyan
logger > should log detail messages in gray
logger > should log warning messages in yellow with a warning icon
logger > should log error messages in red with an error icon
logger > should log success messages in green with a success icon
loadConfig > config file from configPath path > should load config from configPath path
loadConfig > config file from configPath path > should return default config when file does not exist
loadConfig > config file from default path > should load config from default path
loadConfig > config file from default path > should return default config when no config file exists
loadConfig > config file corner cases > should handle config file without default export
loadConfig > config file corner cases > should allow config to override baseDir when specified
loadConfig > config file corner cases > should throw error when config file fails to load
defineConfig > should return the same config object passed to it
defineConfig > should work with minimal config
defineConfig > should work with full config
defineConfig > should work with empty config object
generateAction > family type generation > should generate with family builder
generateAction > family type generation > should use default values when config values are missing
generateAction > standalone type generation > should generate with standalone builder
generateAction > standalone type generation > should use process.cwd() when baseDir is not specified
generateAction > standalone type generation > should default to standalone when type is undefined
generateAction > error handling > should handle config loading error
generateAction > error handling > should handle generation error
generateAction > error handling > should handle non-Error objects
generateAction > dry-run mode > should pass dryRun: true to family builder
generateAction > dry-run mode > should pass dryRun: true to standalone builder
generateAction > dry-run mode > should default dryRun to false when not provided
generateAction > platform preset > should use nativeOptions preset when platform is native
generateAction > platform preset > should use defaultOptions preset when platform is web
generateAction > platform preset > should use defaultOptions preset when platform is not specified
generateAction > platform preset > should allow user options to override the native preset
generateAction > config options merging > should merge svgr options from config
generateAction > custom directories > should use custom assetsDir and srcDir from config
generateAction > custom directories > should use custom directories with family builder
